name: python3-nassl
title: python3-nassl
description:
Experimental OpenSSL wrapper for Python 3
Experimental Python wrapper for OpenSSL. Do NOT use for anything serious. This
code has not been properly tested/reviewed and is absolutely not production
ready. For example, nassl uses an insecure, outdated version of OpenSSL.
.
This wrapper is needed by SSLyze.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-nassl because Experimental OpenSSL wrapper for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-nassl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-nassl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-nassl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
